creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 149342
sh(1) archive to add sysutils/zfs-stats-lite

New Port sysutils/zfs-stats-lite.

zfs-stats displays ZFS statistics in human-readable format including
ARC, L2ARC, zfetch (DMU) and vdev cache statistics.

This script is a fork of Martin Matuska's <mm@FreeBSD.org>
zfs-stats: http://www.vx.sk/zfs-stats/

WWW:    http://www.panzura.com/
